_meta.session: Physical AI / World Model expansion. Adds NVIDIA Cosmos (world foundation models) + GR00T (humanoid VLA), Google DeepMind Genie 3 (interactive world model), Physical Intelligence Pi-Zero, OpenVLA. New benchmark category: robot policy evaluation (LIBERO, RoboCasa, RoboTwin 2.0).

benchmarks.name: LIBERO
benchmarks.description: Lifelong Robotic Manipulation benchmark across 4 task suites (Spatial / Object / Goal / Long). Standard simulator-based eval for VLA generalist robot policies. Cosmos Policy 98.5% avg SOTA.

benchmarks.name: RoboCasa
benchmarks.description: Large-Scale household task simulation benchmark — 100+ atomic tasks across 24 environments. Standard evaluation for generalist household robot policies. Cosmos Policy 67.1% with 50 demos.

benchmarks.name: RoboTwin 2.0
benchmarks.description: Bimanual manipulation benchmark with strong domain randomization. Tests two-arm collaboration. LingBot-VA reports 90%+ on RoboTwin 2.0.

benchmarks.name: VLABench
benchmarks.description: Large-scale language-conditioned robotics benchmark — long-horizon tasks across diverse environments and embodiments.

benchmarks.name: Open X-Embodiment
benchmarks.description: Cross-embodiment robotic dataset & benchmark — 970K episodes across 22 robot embodiments. Standard pre-training corpus for VLA models.

benchmarks.name: World Model Consistency Window
benchmarks.description: Consistency horizon for interactive world models — how long generated environments remain coherent. Genie 3 ~minutes at 24fps 720p; Genie 2 ~1 minute.

benchmarks.name: World Model Real-Time FPS
benchmarks.description: Frames per second sustained for real-time interactive world generation. Genie 3 24fps at 720p resolution.

scores._note: Cosmos Policy LIBERO 4-suite avg (Spatial 98.1, Object 100.0, Goal 98.2, Long 97.6). SOTA at release.
Cosmos Policy RoboCasa with only 50 demos/task (vs 300+ for other top models). 'Single-shot' learning regime.
Genie 3 ~3 minutes consistency, 1-minute visual memory horizon. Includes promptable world events (weather, objects).
Pi-Zero (π₀) outperforms OpenVLA + Octo baselines across 5 robot tasks (laundry folding, table bussing). Approximate aggregate.
OpenVLA-7B baseline on LIBERO — generalist manipulation. Pi-Zero comparison baseline.
